document_id: 20 years of Newborn Hearing Screening Infographic_1.24.20.pdf

findings.description: Complex infographic layout flattened into a single column.
findings.evidence: The PDF features a varied layout with horizontal groupings (like the 1, 3, 6 steps) and side-by-side graphical statistics. The HTML converts this entirely into a linear vertical text flow, losing the spatial relationships between elements.

findings.description: Content duplication severely disrupts reading order.
findings.evidence: The HTML rendering displays the title text, embeds an image of the entire original PDF page, and then repeats all the text extracted from the page in a linear format below it, forcing a reader to encounter the information twice.
